recommendations.title: When the Angels Sleep
recommendations.overview: Germán, an honest family man, sees how his whole world wobbles the night when, driving home, accidentally runs over two teenage girls. From that moment, Germán will have to do everything in his power to prevent his life from being destroyed forever.

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: Lesson Plan
recommendations.overview: After a teacher dies, his best friend — a former cop — takes a job at the school where he worked to confront the gang he thinks was responsible.

recommendations.title: Joe: The Busybody
recommendations.overview: A writer accidentally shoots his blackmailer and tries to hide the body.

recommendations.title: Fugitive at 17
recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: Bomb City
recommendations.overview: An ongoing feud between punk rockers and a more affluent clique in a small Texas town leads to a hate crime.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: The sensuous wife of a lunch wagon proprietor and a rootless drifter begin a sordidly steamy affair and conspire to murder her Greek husband.

recommendations.title: How to Have Sex
recommendations.overview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.

recommendations.title: Article 15
recommendations.overview: A young IPS officer’s new posting in rural India has him confronting caste disparities and uncomfortable truths in the face of a gruesome crime. When three girls go missing in the fictional village of Lalgaon, two of them are found dead and there is
